name: Handle WhatsApp support and Cal.com bookings with Gemini and Google Docs

parameters.content:
## WhatsApp AI Support + Cal.com

### How it works

This workflow handles incoming WhatsApp support messages, checks whether the conversation is within WhatsApp’s 24-hour messaging window, and either sends a reopen template or continues with automated support. It pulls company knowledge from Google Docs, uses Gemini-powered AI agents to answer the user and extract booking intent, then attempts to create a Cal.com booking when enough details are available. It composes a final WhatsApp reply and separately logs AI-handled interactions to Google Sheets.

### Setup steps

- Configure WhatsApp Cloud API credentials for both the trigger and reply/template sending nodes, including the approved reopen template used outside the 24-hour window.
- Connect Google Docs credentials and set the company knowledge document used by the Company Knowledge node.
- Configure Google Gemini credentials for both AI agent chat model subnodes.
- Add Cal.com API credentials or headers for the booking HTTP request, and verify the event type, attendee fields, timezone, and booking endpoint payload.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and choose the spreadsheet/sheet used for logging conversations.
- Review the code nodes for expected WhatsApp payload fields, date/time normalization rules, and required booking fields.

### Customization

Adjust the company knowledge document, AI prompts, booking eligibility rules, timezone handling, Cal.com event details, WhatsApp reply wording, and Google Sheets log columns to match the business process.

## WhatsApp intake gate

Receives the inbound WhatsApp message, normalizes the payload, checks whether the conversation is still inside the 24-hour window, and sends a reopen template when normal replies are not allowed.

## Load company knowledge

Fetches the configured Google Docs knowledge source that feeds both the general support response flow and the booking extraction flow.

## Extract booking intent

Builds the booking extraction prompt, runs a Gemini-backed AI agent, and parses the returned booking JSON into structured data.

## Validate booking request

Normalizes extracted date and time information, then determines whether the workflow has enough valid details to attempt a Cal.com booking.

## Build support context

Transforms the retrieved company knowledge into usable context for the support AI response.

## Generate AI answer

Prepares the main support prompt and runs the Gemini-backed AI agent with conversation memory to generate the user-facing assistance response.

## Handle booking outcome

Creates the Cal.com booking when validation succeeds, or prepares a fallback booking reply when the request is missing required details or cannot be attempted.

## Log interaction details

Adds a timestamp and records the AI-handled interaction in Google Sheets for tracking or reporting.

## Send final reply

Combines the AI answer with any booking result or fallback message, then sends the final response back to the user on WhatsApp.

options.systemMessage: Extract booking data only. Output strict JSON only.

parameters.jsCode:
const docContext = $('Build AI Context').first().json.docContext || '';
const user = $('Normalize Message Input').first().json;
const booking = $('Normalize Date and Time').first().json;
const finalPrompt = [
  'You are Black Ball Sporting Club support on WhatsApp.',
  'Reply in concise plain text only.',
  'Use only the business context and recent conversation.',
  'If user is trying to book but details are incomplete, ask only for the missing items.',
  'Never invent pricing, policies, schedules, or contact details.',
  'If unsure, say so and offer human help.',
  '',
  'Business context:',
  docContext,
  '',
  `Customer name: ${user.name || ''}`,
  `Customer message: ${user.body || ''}`,
  `Booking intent: ${booking.bookingIntent}`,
  `Extracted email: ${booking.email}`,
  `Extracted date: ${booking.dateText}`,
  `Extracted time: ${booking.timeText}`
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { finalPrompt } }];

options.systemMessage: You are a WhatsApp support and booking assistant. Keep replies short, clear, and human. No markdown, no bullet points, no headings. Never invent pricing, times, or policies. If booking details are incomplete, ask only for the missing fields.
